conversations.content: Let's do a special rule knowledge quiz to test your understanding of special rules.

Answer using the special rule explained earlier. In the cleanroom of Skyward Semiconductor Wafer Fab, micron-level particles are found attached to the lithography machine lens. According to the contamination emergency handling code, what should be done?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>How to handle micron-level particle attachment on a lithography machine lens in a cleanroom</content>

Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:50004] Time: 2026-06-08-14:15, Content: Skyward Semiconductor Wafer Fab Cleanroom Contamination Emergency Handling Code: If micron-level particle attachment is detected on the lithography machine lens, suspend the current wafer exposure process, then activate the ultrasonic cleaning robotic arm for lens self-cleaning; if the cleanroom negative pressure system fails causing outside air backflow, lower the emergency physical airlock barrier, then activate the backup high-efficiency particle filter; if an operator's cleanroom suit is found to be damaged or the operator has exposed skin in violation of rules, force the involved person to immediately exit the cleanroom, then perform particle blow-off on the area where the violation occurred; whenever any of the above occurs, a yellow contamination warning light must be turned on, product flow in the affected area must be suspended, and a full cleanliness re-test must be initiated. Low-relevance memory fragments: none.

conversations.think: Memory [mem-id:50004] stipulates that if particles are attached to the lithography lens, suspend the current wafer exposure process, then activate the ultrasonic cleaning robotic arm for lens self-cleaning. Also, whenever any situation occurs, turn on the yellow contamination warning light, suspend product flow in the affected area, and initiate a full cleanliness re-test.
conversations.content: According to the emergency handling code, you must suspend the current wafer exposure process, then activate the ultrasonic cleaning robotic arm for lens self-cleaning! At the same time, you must turn on the yellow contamination warning light, suspend all product flow in the affected area, and initiate a full cleanliness re-test.
Correct! You have mastered this rule.
